title: His Film Is Spain’s Submission to the Oscars. He’s Not Sure How Spanish It Is.
summary_full: Spanish cinema has entered a new and more diverse era, film experts say. Oliver Laxe, the director of Oscar-nominated “Sirat,” embodies the shift.
summary_public: Spanish cinema has entered a new and more diverse era, film experts say. Oliver Laxe, the director of Oscar-nominated “Sirat,” embodies the shift.
